mapper.select:
/* LLM 모델 목록 조회 llm.selectLlmList */ SELECT A.MODEL_ID , A.MODEL_NAME , A.PROVIDER_ID , A.VERSION , A.INPUT_COST , A.OUTPUT_COST , A.USE_YN AS MODEL_USE_YN , A.DESCRIPTION AS MODEL_DESCRIPTION , A.SORT_ORDER , A.CREATE_DT AS MODEL_CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT AS MODEL_MODIFY_DT
, B.PROVIDER_NAME , B.BASE_URL , B.AUTH_TYPE , B.DESCRIPTION AS PROVIDER_DESCRIPTION , B.USE_YN AS PROVIDER_USE_YN , B.CREATE_DT AS PROVIDER_CREATE_DT , B.MODIFY_DT AS PROVIDER_MODIFY_DT
, C.API_URL , 'confidential' AS API_KEY , C.TMO_SEC , C.RETRY_CNT , C.CUST_HEADERS
, D.TEMPERATURE , D.TOP_P , D.MAX_TOKENS , D.CTXT_WIN , D.FREQ_PENALTY , D.PRES_PENALTY , D.STREAM_YN , D.FN_CALL_YN , D.VISION_YN
, E.DAY_REQ_LMT , E.RPM_LIMIT , E.TPM_LIMIT , E.DAY_COST_LMT
, F.ROLE_ID , F.ALLOWED_YN
FROM TB_LLM_MDL A LEFT JOIN TB_LLM_PROVIDER B ON B.PROVIDER_ID = A.PROVIDER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LLM_MDL_API C ON C.MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LLM_MDL_PARAM D ON D.MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LLM_MDL_LMT E ON E.MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LLM_MDL_ACCESS F ON F.MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER ASC , A.MODEL_ID ASC
